transactions.desc: Arias is being promoted to Triple-A Worcester, Tommy Cassell of the Worcester Telegram & Gazette reports.
Haase was placed on unconditional release waivers by the Giants on Thursday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The San Diego Padres traded RHP Ron Marinaccio to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Pirates designated Santana for assignment Thursday, Colin Beazley of the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette reports.
The Orioles designated Rodriguez for assignment Thursday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles claimed Pozo off waivers from the Cardinals on Thursday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Blue Jays claimed Martin off waivers from the Orioles on Thursday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Blue Jays optioned Keys to Triple-A Buffalo on Thursday.
The Blue Jays recalled Macko from Triple-A Buffalo on Thursday.
The Blue Jays recalled Schneider from Triple-A Buffalo on Thursday.
The Rays activated Scholtens (wrist) from the 15-day injured list Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Durham.
The Blue Jays optioned Estrada to Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday.
The Orioles optioned Walker to Triple-A Norfolk on Thursday.
The Red Sox optioned Rivera to Triple-A Worcester following Wednesday's doubleheader against the Orioles, Tim Healey of The Boston Globe reports.
The Yankees returned Jones to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre following Wednesday's doubleheader against Pittsburgh.
The Yankees optioned Castro to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Wednesday.
The Yankees reinstated Fried (elbow) from the injured list for his start against the Pirates in Game 2 of Wednesday's doubleheader.
The Orioles recalled Walker from Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Blue Jays recalled Van Eyk from Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports.
The Blue Jays recalled Pinango from Triple-A Buffalo, Arden Zwelling of Sportsnet.ca reports. He'll start in left field and bat fifth Wednesday against the Rays.
The Red Sox recalled Gamboa from Triple-A Worcester on Wednesday.
The Guardians optioned Watson to Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Guardians activated Ramirez (hand) from the 10-day injured list Wednesday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Kansas City Royals traded RHP Max Martin to the Houston Astros.
The Houston Astros traded RHP Nate Pearson to the Kansas City Royals.
The Athletics recalled Barnett from Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday.
The Royals designated Misner for assignment Wednesday.
Atlanta optioned Ritchie to Triple-A Gwinnett on Wednesday.
Atlanta reinstated Perez (forearm) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his start Wednesday against the Padres at Truist Park.
